case_title: PHIL WALKER VS. BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-12-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PHIL WALKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RESIDENTIAL BEACON COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ALFARO, AGENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON RECORD. DEFENDANT WISHES TO RETAIN THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALKER, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 25.00 - SERVED FEB-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PHIL WALKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RESIDENTIAL BEACON COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL ALFARO, AGENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON RECORD. DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF CLAIM IS PREMATURE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/09/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WALKER, PHIL AS TO DEFENDANT BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY WALKER, PHIL BEACON RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ASSOCIATION
